'''Burro Flats''' was a [[Wikipedia:Philology|philologist]] of the [[Baobab Archives]] on [[Manda/Legends|Manda]]. Through his interaction with the [[Gungan/Legends|Gungans]] of [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]], Flats was able to create a limited dictionary of [[Gungan (language)|Gunganese]] and [[Old Gungan/Legends|Old Gungan]] terms.

In addition to the dictionary, Flats was also known for his [[Rolling Moisture Cell]], an application of the Gungan [[Hydrostatic field/Legends|hydrostatic field]] used to transport water in dry environments. It was especially popular on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]].
